turns.say: Guten Tag! Bis wann kann man bei Ihnen am Samstag frühstücken?
turns.transcript: Guten Tag, bis wann kann man bei Ihnen am Samstag frühstücken?
turns.reply: Am Samstag können Sie bei uns bis 10:00 Uhr frühstücken. Die Frühstückszeit beginnt um 8:00 Uhr.

breakfast.included: Depends on the room rate — rates named 'mit Frühstück' include it, 'ohne Frühstück' do not.
breakfast.offering: Sausages, cheeses, muesli, tomatoes, cucumbers, boiled and scrambled eggs, yogurt, pancakes.
breakfast.dietary: Vegetarian options available; for gluten intolerance guests may bring gluten-free rolls which the kitchen will bake.

facts.food_drink: No restaurant service, but a bar and an outdoor area serve guests until 8:00 PM. Room cleaning on request via door sign.

turns.say: Thank you! And one more thing — is there a bar or somewhere to get a drink in the hotel?
turns.transcript: Thank you. And one more thing. Is there a bar or somewhere to get a drink in the hotel?
turns.reply: Yes, we have a bar that serves drinks until 8:00 PM. There’s also an outdoor area where you can relax with a drink.

breakfast.included: Depends on the room rate — rates named 'mit Frühstück' include it, 'ohne Frühstück' do not.
breakfast.offering: Sausages, cheeses, muesli, tomatoes, cucumbers, boiled and scrambled eggs, yogurt, pancakes.
breakfast.dietary: Vegetarian options available; for gluten intolerance guests may bring gluten-free rolls which the kitchen will bake.
